message:
feat(codegen): Apply target_dict_value_type context to dict comprehensions

Extends the dict widening infrastructure to dict comprehensions:
- Check target_dict_value_type context when generating dict comprehension
- Use widened type (e.g., runtime.PyValue) instead of inferring from expression
- Wrap comprehension values in toPyValue when using widened type

This ensures dict comprehensions also respect the widened type when
assigned to variables that hold dicts with different value types.

All 6 tests pass: bool, int_literal, unary, longexp, binop, float
